commit_scope: Add a bounded model slice chunk-range floor.

cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/model-vitality.fk form-stdlib/cell-sync.fk form-stdlib/slice-update-roundtrip.fk form-stdlib/slice-merge.fk form-stdlib/model-data-sharing.fk form-stdlib/tests/model-slice-chunk-range-band.fk

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested; this is a local Form runtime floor.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Model data sharing now has a bounded chunk-range slice policy receipt over existing tensor chunk rows and chunk-set roots.

phase_gate.gate: Chunk-range slice policy must be explicit before live mesh payload transport or chunk-range merkle proof can be claimed as first-class.
phase_gate.next: Add live chunk payload merkle proof, mesh transport, durable eval query, optimizer-state delta rows, and privacy/conflict receipts as separate bounded lanes.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: Model data sharing had request/re-address/apply/source/merge receipts, but chunk-range slice policy remained a named next wall.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: model-slice-chunk-range returns 4095 four-way and is admitted to form/fourth-arm-bands.txt.
not_claimed: chunk-range payload merkle proof over a live carrier
